name: Salmon Patties
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup all-purpose flour, more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix egg with fork. Add salt, pepper, Old Bay, and parsley.
2. Drain water from salmon. Add to egg mixture and mix well. Add green onions and mix again.
3. Add 1/3 cup each of the flour and the cornmeal and mix well. If needed, continue adding equal parts of flour and cornmeal until mixture is thick enough to hold together. Form fist-size balls and flatten out to patties.
4. Use cast-iron skillet with 1/4 inch of cooking oil on medium-high heat.
5. Cook 3-4 minutes on each side or until browned.
